<Badge text="fixing-metadata" variant="note" /> <Badge text="28 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Targeted UI polish, WCAG/a11y fixes, and HTML metadata/OG/JSON-LD audits. Documentation-only skills with no observed hooks; complements `addyosmani/web-quality-skills` and `vercel-labs/agent-skills@web-design-guidelines`.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui --skill fixing-accessibility --skill fixing-metadata -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/fixing-metadata`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/fixing-metadata.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui --skill fixing-accessibility --skill fixing-metadata -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Targeted UI polish, WCAG/a11y fixes, and HTML metadata/OG/JSON-LD audits. Documentation-only skills with no observed hooks; complements `addyosmani/web-quality-skills` and `vercel-labs/agent-skills@web-design-guidelines`.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

HTML metadata, OG tags, JSON-LD audits and fixes.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill baseline-ui --skill fixing-accessibility --skill fixing-metadata -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

[ibelick/ui-skills](https://github.com/ibelick/ui-skills)

General purpose agent skills in similar domain (see catalog for alternatives); e.g. other SQL or UI or infra skills.
